key.name: grayscale-enabled
key.description: Whether the grayscale effect is currently enabled globally

key.name: toggle-keybinding
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle grayscale effect

key.name: show-panel-indicator
key.description: Whether to display the grayscale toggle indicator in the top panel

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Whether to display notifications when grayscale state changes

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of grayscale effect transitions in seconds

key.name: effect-quality
key.description: Quality level of the grayscale effect (affects performance)

key.name: performance-mode
key.description: Enable performance optimizations for lower-end hardware

key.name: per-monitor-mode
key.description: Enable independent control for each monitor

key.name: auto-enable-on-startup
key.description: Automatically enable grayscale when the extension starts

key.name: global-enabled
key.description: Persistent storage for global grayscale state

key.name: monitor-states
key.description: Persistent storage for per-monitor grayscale states

key.name: monitor-exclusions
key.description: List of monitor indices to exclude from grayscale effects

key.name: monitor-layout-config
key.description: Configuration data for different monitor layouts and arrangements

key.name: primary-monitor-only
key.description: When enabled, effects only apply to the primary monitor

key.name: monitor-detection-sensitivity
key.description: Sensitivity level for monitor hotplug detection

key.name: auto-sync-monitors
key.description: Automatically sync monitor states when monitors are connected/disconnected

key.name: preserve-monitor-states
key.description: Preserve individual monitor states across layout changes

key.name: hotplug-debounce-time
key.description: Time in milliseconds to wait before processing monitor hotplug events

key.name: performance-metrics
key.description: Runtime performance metrics for monitoring and optimization
